ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-25-2021 Continued To Mar-15-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Will Doyle appeared by zoom for Julie Niiro (Administrator).

Mr. Doyle stated that he informed his Client of the need to file a separate petition for instructions, that he is not sure if it impacted the Client and the Beneficiaries decision to have the Court resolve the issue of the loan and that he dropped the ball on pushing that communication. Mr. Doyle also stated that his Client is going to get back to him today, that he will know today which way they are going to go, that he will file something one way or the other, and that if needed, he will file a petition on status of close. Status on close of estate is continued to March 15, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-14-2020 Continued To Jan-25-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Will Doyle appeared by zoom for Julie Niiro (Administrator).

Mr. Doyle stated that he was hoping to have a petition for final distribution on file at this point, that he will have to include a petition for instructions regarding a question of a loan, and requested additional time to prepare and file the petition. Mr. Doyle also stated that this was a loan that the Decedent had kept notes on, that loans were made by various family members to one of the Beneficiaries of the estate and that the amount of the loan is one of the questions. In addition, Mr. Doyle stated that the notes of the Decedent indicate $100,000.00 with interest, but the principal amount was significantly lower. The Court informed Mr. Doyle that a separate petition is required. Mr. Doyle requested a 30-day continuance. Status on close of estate is continued to January 25, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. to see if a petition for instructions is on file. The Court will then continue the status hearing to the same date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
